mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(m15.open_price, h1.open_price, tmp.open_price, 0) FROM ( SELECT 0 AS open_price ,#{symbol} AS symbol ) tmp LEFT JOIN fx_bar_15m m15 ON m15.symbol = tmp.symbol AND m15.bar_date_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{contractHm}, '%Y%m%d%H%i') LEFT JOIN fx_bar_1h h1 ON h1.symbol = tmp.symbol AND h1.bar_date_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{contractHm}, '%Y%m%d%H')
